message:
feat(di): add scope constraint validation for dependency injection

Implement scope constraint validation as per fastapi_rust-kpe:
- Request-scoped dependencies cannot depend on function-scoped ones
- This prevents stale cached values in request-scoped dependencies

Changes:
- Add DependencyScopeError for clear error messages
- Enhance ResolutionStack to track dependency scopes
- Add check_scope_violation method for scope validation
- Validate scope constraints in Depends/DependsCleanup from_request
- Export DependencyScopeError and CircularDependencyError from lib.rs
- Add comprehensive tests for all scope combinations

Closes: fastapi_rust-kpe

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
